'''Basbakhan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] warrior and bodyguard. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Bolpuhr]], he and [[Olmahk]] were assigned to be the bodyguards of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. He was likely killed by [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong warriors]] during the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] while guarding [[Randa Besadii Diori]].
